purpose: Source-owned browser operator console snapshot contract for compact runtime views that do not imply native-only support.

markers: dispatcher diagnostics reported unreleased closed handles

unsupported_field_requirements: each unsupported_native_fields entry has status unsupported_native_only
each unsupported_native_fields entry has a nonempty omission_reason
browser snapshot payloads must not report native-only fields as present
unsupported native fields are omitted explicitly instead of silently missing

wasm_compile_proof.proof_command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_browser_operator_console_snapshot_wasm_minimal CARGO_PROFILE_DEV_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo check -p asupersync-browser-core --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --no-default-features --features minimal

markdown_golden: | snapshot | runtime_state | pressure | admission | proof | omitted_native_fields |
validation_commands: rch exec -- rustfmt --edition 2024 --check asupersync-browser-core/src/types.rs asupersync-browser-core/src/lib.rs asupersync-browser-core/src/exports.rs asupersync-browser-core/tests/abi_exports.rs tests/browser_operator_console_snapshot_contract.rs

rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_browser_operator_console_snapshot_contract CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test browser_operator_console_snapshot_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture

rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_browser_operator_console_snapshot_leak_ratchet CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync-browser-core browser_operator_snapshot_from_dispatcher_diagnostics_fails_closed_on_leaked_handles -- --nocapture

rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_browser_operator_console_snapshot_export CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync-browser-core browser_operator_snapshot_export_projects_live_dispatcher_diagnostics -- --nocapture

rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_browser_operator_console_snapshot_wasm_minimal CARGO_PROFILE_DEV_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo check -p asupersync-browser-core --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --no-default-features --features minimal
